description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a metallic gray chassis and a large, high-resolution display. The front features a nearly edge-to-edge screen with thin bezels and a visible notch at the top center, likely for a camera. The keyboard is black with a spacious trackpad below, and the hinge design allows the screen to open at a wide angle. The back of the device displays a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the lid. The sides are thin, with minimal visible ports, emphasizing a sleek and minimalist design. The overall appearance is premium, with a smooth, hard surface and a professional finish.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a large, edge-to-edge display, black keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the lid. The design is minimalist and premium, with a smooth, hard finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a notch and the black keyboard with a wide trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and the open screen; minimal ports are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the metallic lid with a centered, glossy black Apple logo; no ports or keyboard visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and open screen, similar to the left side with minimal visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out on the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is visible and appears to be a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad.
